examples: Beijing Jingjiang North Property Management Ltd. Co First Subcompany reserves the right whether to reissue a new card or not.
The change of service content and discount are subject to the announcement of Beijing Jingjiang North Property Management Ltd. Co First Subcompany.
You must report the loss of the Discount card to Beijing Jingjiang North Property Management Ltd. Co First Subcompany and apply for a new one, if you lost your card. The fee is 80yuan.
